name: SF Brain
description: High-density Salesforce operator kernel injected once per session — describe-before-query rules, API picker, anonymous Apex verification loop, and CLI power moves

docs.summary: Injects the Salesforce Operator Kernel once per session plus a live bundled-extension context that prioritizes enabled SF Pi workflows before generic skills or raw CLI fallbacks.
safety: Never registers tools; the kernel is delivered through the session entry log only.
